markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the strategy, prioritization, and user experience for the new code component library.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** Prioritization will now align with user research from the AppGen release (18k prompts) to build components that solve high-level use cases (e.g., e-commerce, calculators), not just fill feature gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Production Bottleneck:** GrowthX can auto-generate components at scale but is blocked by the lack of a scalable process for creating their landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**User Onboarding:** The initial CLI-based install will be replaced by a "Deploy to Webflow Cloud" API button to simplify the process for non-technical users.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [**Success Metric:** The primary goal is creating high-quality content that enables the "beginner dev" audience, with secondary metrics like SEO traffic and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)

## Topics

### Code Component Library Goal

  - [**Objective:** Build a large library of custom React components for direct import into Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Scope:** From simple UI elements (accordions, date pickers) to complex, API-driven applications (e.g., a Greenhouse job board).](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Production:** An AI workflow generates vanilla React/CSS components with \~90-95% accuracy, enabling high-volume production.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**User Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [Components inherit site styles via predefined CSS variables (e.g., `text-primary`).](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [Each component includes a local dev server (`npm run dev`) for easy offline styling and testing.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

### Prioritization & User Research

  - [**Initial Framework:** GrowthX's framework used sources like Discourse, benchmarks, and Webflow's native component limitations.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**New Input:** Paige introduced user research from the AppGen release (18,000 categorized prompts).](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:** This data reveals high-level user goals (e.g., pricing calculators, application flows), ensuring components solve real-world problems, not just fill feature gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will update its prioritization framework using this research.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### User Onboarding & Distribution

  - [**Problem:** The current CLI-based install process is a barrier for non-technical users.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [**Solution:** A "Deploy to Webflow Cloud" API button is in development to enable one-click installs.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [**Interim Plan:** If the API is not ready for launch, the backup is extremely clear, copy-pasteable CLI documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
  - [**Distribution:** Components will live in an open-source GitHub repo. A scalable process is needed to auto-generate landing pages for each component, likely using Fern (docs-as-code).](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Success Metrics & Content Strategy

  - [**Primary Goal:** Enable the "beginner dev" audience with high-quality, non-slop content.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [**Secondary Metrics:** SEO traffic, LLM visibility, and dev usage.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [**GrowthX Strategy:** Code components are part of a larger content ecosystem designed to guide users from discovery to activation.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [**Tool:** The proprietary "Check That" tool will monitor LLM visibility and create a feedback loop for content adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Paige:** Share the AppGen user research summary with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Paige:** Provide the native component roadmap (even bullet points) to prevent duplicate effort.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**Paige:** Connect GrowthX with the docs team to plan the scalable landing page process using Fern.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Update the component prioritization framework using the AppGen research.](https://fathom.video/share/DJnKKrycrYVxxR6XsWt2ecDag6pMwupG?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
